---
name: Panel takeover planning
about: Ask about replacing an existing hosting panel with FreeWebPanel
title: "[Takeover] "
labels: migration,takeover

---

## Current panel

Example: cPanel / WHM, CWP, DirectAdmin, Plesk, CyberPanel, Hestia, Virtualmin, ISPConfig, aaPanel, generic.

## Server OS

Example: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS, AlmaLinux 9, RockyLinux 9.

## Goal

Do you want to keep the same server and IP?

## Services on this server

- Websites:
- DNS:
- Mail:
- SQL:
- Backups:

## Preflight command used

Paste the command with email, domain, IP, tokens, and private values removed.

## Important

Do not post root passwords, private keys, API keys, license keys, customer data, server screenshots with secrets, or private server IPs unless they are intentionally public.
